Module 5 - Traffic Secrets
This module explores traffic acquisition strategies. You’ll learn where to buy traffic from and
how to effectively target the traffic using sound SLM principles. Remember, we need to be able
to achieve the three 10’s before we can effectively close a sale, that means we need to target
prospects that are most likely to love our product, trust and connect with us, and trust and
connect with our company. If you’ve targeted your traffic poorly, then trying to achieve the three
tens becomes almost impossible.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
